title: Klautos Fantasia (Dark Medieval Fantasy)
description: A resource pack that gives Minecraft a more realistic medieval dark fantasy feel.  I created this pack for my YouTube series.  Resolution is 32x32 which maintains a pixelated Minecraft look, but with 4x the resolution of default.
body:
![Resource Pack Cover](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a0dd127af114902c0ba26bac5f481e18c5d21e5.jpeg)

This beautiful dark fantasy resource pack makes minecraft look more realistic and medieval while also maintaining the pixelated feel of minecraft by using 32x textures, giving the pack 4x the resolution of default.  It looks especially great with shaders on!  I created this pack specifically for my YouTube series of the same name.  Check it out if you're interested at the link below.

This pack is an ongoing work in progress, so please consider supporting on [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/Klautos) or joining [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/Klautos) as a member to receive in-dev versions of the pack in between releases.

All textures are subject to copyright and created by Klautos, except for the custom sky which was created by Monsterfish_, and is included in my pack with his permission.  All rights reserved.  You may download and use this pack, but you may not redistribute, sell, modify, or repurpose the pack or any of its contents.

Thank you for stopping by! -Klautos

See the pack in this video :)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/jb6CR73MkdU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Required Mods:
- Fabric
- Fabric API
- Continuity (for connected textures)

Optional Mods:
- SkyBoxify (for custom skies)
- YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL) (needed for SkyBoxify)
- Iris (optional for shader support)
- Sodium (optional for performance & needed for Iris)
